version: 1; Last updated: 2022-04-27 23:53:20+0000

This value set includes codes based on the following rules:

  • Include all codes defined in http://snomed.info/sct version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server)
  • Include all codes defined in http://loinc.org version Not Stated (use latest from terminology server)

name: USCoreGoalCodes
title: US Core Goal Codes
description: Concepts from SNOMED CT  and LOINC code systems that can be used to indicate the goal.
